43.name: Read Device Identification
43.description: Modbus MEI Device ID read query. Standard asset identification sequence.

unauthorized_write_attempt.description: A write command was issued to an ICS Modbus PLC endpoint from an unauthorized source IP address.

authorized_write_activity.description: An authorized Modbus register modification was performed by a verified engineering workstation.

unknown_function_code.description: An unrecognized Modbus function code was detected, representing anomalous packet structure.

2.name: Write (Configuration Command)
2.description: DNP3 Write command issued to update remote register settings.

3.name: Select (Select Before Operate)
3.description: DNP3 Select command received. Outstation armed for control operation.

4.name: Operate (Execution Command)
4.description: DNP3 Operate command executed. Physical controller state modified.

5.name: Direct Operate (Immediate Command)
5.description: DNP3 Direct Operate command executed immediately without a Select stage.

6.name: Direct Operate - No Ack
6.description: DNP3 Direct Operate - No Ack command executed. Outstation state modified without confirmation.

9.name: Warm Restart
9.description: DNP3 command to initiate a warm reset on the RTU/Outstation controller.

13.name: Cold Restart
13.description: DNP3 command to initiate a cold reset, potentially interrupting remote telemetry processes.

14.name: Warm Restart
14.description: DNP3 command to initiate a warm reset on the RTU/Outstation controller.

15.name: Initialize Data
15.description: DNP3 command to re-initialize configuration registers or memory space.

18.name: Application Termination
18.description: DNP3 command ordering application shutdown on outstation runtime environment.

27.name: Delete File
27.description: DNP3 command attempting to delete remote system files on the Outstation.

unauthorized_write_attempt.description: A DNP3 control action (Write/Select/Operate/Reset) was attempted from an unauthorized source IP address.

authorized_write_activity.description: Authorized DNP3 control operation performed by verified engineering workstation.

unknown_function_code.description: An unrecognized DNP3 function code was detected, potential anomalous packet structure.

5.name: Write Var (Data modification)
5.description: S7Comm Write request attempting block data manipulation or variable register overwrite.

26.name: Download Request (Firmware/Block)
26.description: S7Comm Download command issued. Modifies logic/program code blocks running on the Siemens PLC.

40.name: PLC Run (Start Process)
40.description: S7Comm command instructing the PLC to exit STOP mode and execute program logic.

41.name: PLC Stop (Process Halt)
41.description: S7Comm command forcing the Siemens PLC into STOP mode, instantly halting critical field operations.

unauthorized_write_attempt.description: An unauthorized S7Comm command (Write/PLC Stop/Download) was attempted on a Siemens PLC.

authorized_write_activity.description: Authorized S7Comm control operation executed by verified engineering workstation.

unknown_function_code.description: An unrecognized S7comm function code was detected, potential anomalous packet structure.

45.name: Single Command Execution
45.description: IEC 104 Single Command (Type ID 45) issued to toggle remote digital output state.

46.name: Double Command Execution
46.description: IEC 104 Double Command (Type ID 46) issued to trip/close remote breaker circuits.

unauthorized_write_attempt.description: An unauthorized IEC 104 command execution was attempted on the RTU/IED.

authorized_write_activity.description: Authorized IEC 104 command action verified from engineering workstation.

unknown_function_code.description: An unrecognized or unmonitored ASDU Type ID was detected in IEC 104 telemetry.
